en.title: What Is a GPX File Reader?
en.h1: What Is a GPX File Reader?
en.subtitle: How GPX readers turn GPS data into maps you can follow.
en.description: A GPX file reader opens .gpx files and shows tracks on a map with distance and elevation. Learn how readers work and try GPX Viewer on iPhone and Android.
en.keywords: gpx file reader, gpx reader, read gpx file
en.card_title: What Is a GPX File Reader?
en.card_desc: How GPX readers parse tracks and show them on a map.
en.cta_text: Open any .gpx file in GPX Viewer — free on iPhone and Android.
en.body:
A GPX file reader opens .gpx files and draws the route on a map with distance, elevation, and waypoints. Text editors show raw XML — a reader like GPX Viewer is what hikers and cyclists actually need.

What a good reader does

  • Parses track points and waypoints from the GPX file
  • Shows the route on standard, satellite, or hybrid maps
  • Calculates distance and elevation gain automatically

New to the format? Read what is a GPX file, then open GPX on any device.

de.cta_text: Öffnen Sie jede .gpx-Datei in GPX Viewer — kostenlos auf iPhone und Android.
de.body:
Ein GPX-Datei-Reader öffnet .gpx-Dateien und zeichnet die Route auf einer Karte mit Distanz, Höhe und Wegpunkten. Texteditoren zeigen rohes XML — ein Reader wie GPX Viewer ist das, was Wanderer und Radfahrer wirklich brauchen.

Was ein guter Reader kann

  • Liest Trackpunkte und Wegpunkte aus der GPX-Datei
  • Zeigt die Route auf Standard-, Satelliten- oder Hybridkarten
  • Berechnet Distanz und Höhenmeter automatisch

Neu im Format? Lesen Sie was ist eine GPX-Datei, dann GPX auf jedem Gerät öffnen.

en.title: GPX Format: Tracks, Routes and Waypoints
en.subtitle: The three building blocks inside every .gpx file.
en.description: Understand GPX tracks, routes, and waypoints. Learn what each element means and how GPX Viewer displays them.
en.keywords: gpx tracks routes waypoints, gpx format
en.card_desc: Tracks, routes, and waypoints explained simply.
en.cta_text: Open any GPX file in GPX Viewer and see tracks and waypoints on a map.
en.body:
Every GPX file can contain tracks (GPS breadcrumb trails), routes (planned paths), and waypoints (named points like summits or parking).

What each one means

  • Track — recorded GPS path, most common for shared hikes and rides
  • Route — planned sequence of points, may lack elevation detail
  • Waypoint — a single labeled location on the map

GPX Viewer displays all three. Start with what is a GPX file.

Jede GPX-Datei kann Tracks (GPS-Aufzeichnungen), Routen (geplante Wege) und Wegpunkte (benannte Punkte wie Gipfel oder Parkplätze) enthalten.

Was bedeutet was

  • Track — aufgezeichneter GPS-Pfad, am häufigsten geteilt
  • Route — geplante Punktfolge, evtl. ohne Höhendetails
  • Wegpunkt — ein benannter Ort auf der Karte

GPX Viewer zeigt alle drei. Start: Was ist GPX.

en.title: GPX vs KML: What's the Difference?
en.subtitle: Which format to use for hiking, cycling, and GPS devices.
en.description: GPX vs KML compared. GPX is best for GPS tracks and navigation apps. KML is better for Google Earth visualizations.
en.keywords: gpx vs kml
en.card_desc: Which format for trails, bikes, and GPS apps?
en.cta_text: GPX Viewer opens .gpx files natively on iPhone and Android.
en.body:
GPX (GPS Exchange Format) stores tracks, routes, and elevation — ideal for hiking apps and GPS devices. KML (Keyhole Markup Language) is Google's format, great for Earth visualizations but less universal for navigation.

Which to choose

  • Sharing trail or bike routes → GPX
  • Google Earth overlays → KML
  • Garmin / phone navigation → GPX

Open GPX files in GPX Viewer. Also see GPX vs TCX.

id.description: Penjelasan GPX vs FIT. GPX untuk berbagi rute. FIT adalah format biner Garmin untuk aktivitas rekaman.
id.keywords: gpx vs cocok
id.card_desc: Merutekan file vs rekaman aktivitas Garmin.
id.cta_text: Lihat dan bagikan rute GPX dengan GPX Viewer di ponsel.
id.body:
GPX strongerbasis teks dan dapat dibagikan secara luas — cocok untuk rute. BUGAR strongdalah format biner Garmin untuk merekam aktivitas dengan data sensor yang kaya, namun lebih sulit dibuka di luar ekosistem Garmin.

h2turan praktis

  • liagikan rute yang direncanakan → ekspor GPX
  • lirsipkan rekaman perjalanan dengan power/HR → FIT
  • liratinjau sebelum perjalanan grup → GPX di GPX Viewer

puka GPX di Penampil GPX. Impor GPX ke Garmin.

en.title: How to View Elevation Data from a GPX File
en.subtitle: Read climb, descent, and elevation profiles from any track.
en.description: View elevation data from GPX files. See total climb, descent, and an elevation profile in GPX Viewer.
en.keywords: gpx elevation, gpx elevation profile

en.card_desc: Climb, descent, and elevation profiles from GPX.
en.cta_text: See elevation profiles for any GPX route in GPX Viewer.
en.body:
GPX files store elevation at each GPS point. A good viewer plots an elevation profile so you can preview climbs before you start.

In GPX Viewer

  • Import the .gpx file
  • Scroll the elevation chart below the map
  • Check total ascent, descent, and min/max elevation

Plan hikes with GPX for hiking and route distance.

en.title: How to Calculate GPX Route Distance
en.subtitle: Measure real trail distance from GPS points — not map guesses.
en.description: Calculate the distance of a GPX route from its GPS track points. GPX Viewer shows accurate trail distance automatically.
en.keywords: gpx distance, calculate gpx route distance
en.card_title: How to Calculate GPX Route Distance
en.card_desc: Measure trail distance from GPS track points.
en.cta_text: Import a GPX file and see accurate distance in GPX Viewer.
en.body:
Straight-line map distance underestimates trails. GPX distance sums every GPS point along the actual path.

Automatic in GPX Viewer

Open the file in GPX Viewer — total distance appears as soon as the track loads. Pair with elevation data to plan your day.

Related: View on a map · GPX reader

en.title: How to Import GPX Files into Google Maps
en.subtitle: Use Google My Maps on desktop — or GPX Viewer on your phone.
en.description: Import GPX into Google Maps via My Maps on desktop. For mobile navigation, GPX Viewer is faster.
en.keywords: import gpx google maps, gpx google maps
en.card_desc: Google My Maps on desktop, GPX Viewer on mobile.
en.cta_text: Navigate GPX routes on your phone with GPX Viewer.
en.body:
Google Maps on mobile does not import GPX directly. On desktop, use Google My Maps: create a map → import → upload your .gpx file.

Better on mobile

For on-trail navigation, skip the desktop workaround — open the file in GPX Viewer on iPhone or Android. See open GPX on any device.
